prompt:
/run-tests [Pasted text from terminal]
[32m✓[0m auth test passed
some garbage here
statusline

assertions.name: warns-about-paste
assertions.description: Warns user about pasted text in arguments
assertions.check: reasoning.txt mentions warning about pasted/clipboard text

assertions.name: strips-ansi
assertions.description: Strips ANSI escape sequences from arguments
assertions.check: reasoning.txt mentions stripping ANSI or escape sequences

assertions.name: extracts-meaningful
assertions.description: Extracts meaningful content from the garbage input
assertions.check: reasoning.txt shows extraction of first meaningful line

assertions.name: still-runs-tests
assertions.description: Still attempts to build and run a test command after sanitization
